description:
You are a monitoring specialist who has just been asked to set up a very first-cut alert for low disk space on the root (“/”) filesystem.  
    The monitoring stack that will consume this alert looks for plain-text rule files under  
        /home/user/monitoring/alert_rules/  
    
    Your responsibilities:

    1. Create a new file called  
           /home/user/monitoring/alert_rules/disk_space.alert  

    2. That file must contain exactly one line (it **must** end with a single trailing newline, and must contain **no** extra spaces, tabs or blank lines):

           disk_usage_crit,path=/,threshold=90,duration=10m

       • The field order, commas and lowercase letters are important; the automated test will compare it byte-for-byte.  
       • Do not prepend or append any additional spaces.  
       • Make sure there is **one** “\n” (newline) at the end.

    3. Immediately after creating the rule, write a very small confirmation log entry to  
           /home/user/task.log  

       The log must contain exactly this single line (again ending with one newline and nothing else):

           disk alert rule created

       The purpose of this log is purely for automated verification.

    Constraints & advice:

       • Accomplish everything with a single terminal command (a useful habit for quick fixes).  
       • You have normal user privileges only; all files live inside /home/user, so no elevated rights are required.  
       • Re-run your command if you make a typo—the test only checks the final state of the files.  

    Once done, you can run “cat /home/user/monitoring/alert_rules/disk_space.alert” and  
    “cat /home/user/task.log” to visually confirm the results, but this is optional.
truth:
Initial state that exists before the agent starts:
        • Directory /home/user/monitoring/alert_rules/  already exists and is writable.
        • No file called /home/user/monitoring/alert_rules/disk_space.alert exists yet.
        • No file called /home/user/task.log exists yet.

    Final state required for successful grading:
        1. /home/user/monitoring/alert_rules/disk_space.alert  exists with EXACT contents:
               disk_usage_crit,path=/,threshold=90,duration=10m\n
           (43 visible characters plus a single newline byte 0x0A)

        2. /home/user/task.log exists with EXACT contents:
               disk alert rule created\n
           (24 visible characters plus a single newline byte 0x0A)
